description: A template condition referencing an unresolvable attribute wrapped in default() contains that failure and evaluates normally to the declared fallback, passing on a truthy fallback; the identical unwrapped reference fails closed instead and is recorded as an evaluation failure.

fixture.note: entity 01J8Z3K4N5P6Q7R8S9T0V1W2Z3 has no 'battery_ok' attribute declared; attr() on it fails to evaluate

results.reason: default (RUL-285) contains the unresolvable-attribute failure from its upstream stage and substitutes its truthy fallback; the pipeline evaluates normally from that point, so the condition passes on the fallback value and nothing is recorded as an evaluation failure
no default() wraps this reference, so RUL-284's ordinary fail-closed rule applies without exception: the condition evaluates not-matched/false and the failure is recorded for operator visibility
